# Tmux Configuration — Project Documentation

> Generated: 2026-03-25 | Scan level: Quick | Scanner: bmad-document-project-v2

## Project Overview

Personal tmux configuration built on **gpakosz/.tmux** (Oh my tmux!) framework. Uses a single `.tmux.conf.local` file for all customization — keybindings, theming, plugins, and settings. Managed via GNU Stow as part of a larger dotfiles repository.

**Style:** ThePrimeagen-inspired keybindings + Daniel Miessler essentials (session persistence, clipboard integration).

## Architecture

```
~/.dotfiles/tmux/
├── .tmux.conf              ← Oh my tmux! framework (upstream base)
├── .tmux.conf.local        ← USER CONFIG (545 lines) — all customization here
├── .tmux/                  ← Runtime data directory
│   ├── backups/
│   ├── diagnostics/
│   ├── health/
│   ├── logs/
│   ├── performance/
│   ├── plugins/            ← TPM-managed plugins
│   ├── resurrect/          ← Session persistence data
│   ├── scripts/
│   └── workspaces/
└── .config/tmux/           ← Project workspace (this directory)
    ├── scripts/            ← 9 operational scripts (2081 lines)
    ├── tmuxedo/            ← Tmuxedo plugin catalog + bindings
    ├── design-artifacts/   ← WDS design pipeline (scaffolded)
    ├── Plans/              ← Implementation plans
    ├── docs/Plans/         ← Documentation plans
    └── TODO.md             ← Active task list
```

## Key Configuration Sections (.tmux.conf.local)

| Section | Lines | Purpose |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Bindings | 10-17 | Stock binding preservation, session/window/pane creation |
| Display | 62-72 | 24-bit color auto-detection |
| Theming | 75-363 | 17-color palette, status bar layout, indicators, battery |
| User Customizations | 382-435 | ThePrimeagen bindings, vim pane nav, popups |
| TPM Plugins | 437-489 | 5 plugins: resurrect, continuum, vim-navigator, yank, fzf |

## Plugin Ecosystem

### TPM Plugins (Active — loaded via .tmux.conf.local)

| Plugin | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| tmux-resurrect | Session persistence across tmux restarts |
| tmux-continuum | Auto-save sessions every 15 minutes, auto-restore |
| vim-tmux-navigator | Seamless ctrl+h/j/k/l between vim and tmux panes |
| tmux-yank | System clipboard integration in copy mode |
| tmux-fzf | FZF-powered tmux operations |

### Tmuxedo Catalog (23 plugins available via tmuxedo TUI)

Managed via `prefix + C-t` (TUI), `prefix + r` (install), `prefix + C-u` (update). Includes colortag, gitmux, kubectx, battery, cpu, logging, 1password, and more.

## Custom Keybindings

| Binding | Action |
|---------|--------|
| `prefix + f` | fzf project picker (tmux-sessionizer) |
| `prefix + a` | Toggle last session |
| `prefix + i` | cht.sh cheat sheet lookup |
| `prefix + g` | Lazygit popup (80x80%) |
| `prefix + T` | Terminal popup (80x80%) |
| `prefix + h/j/k/l` | Vim-style pane navigation |
| `prefix + m` | Toggle mouse support |

## Status Bar

- **Left:** Session name + system uptime
- **Right:** kubectx:namespace | prefix/mouse/pairing/sync indicators | battery | time | user@host
- **Separators:** Plain text (powerline symbols available but commented out)
- **Indicators:** ⌨ prefix, ↗ mouse, ⚇ pairing, ⚏ synchronized, ! root

## Operational Scripts

| Script | Lines | Purpose |
|--------|-------|---------|
| project_starter.sh | 443 | Bootstrap project sessions with predefined layouts |
| install.sh | 338 | Full installation (framework + plugins + config) |
| validate-config.sh | 286 | Configuration validation and syntax checking |
| troubleshoot.sh | 254 | Diagnostic information gathering |
| uninstall.sh | 240 | Clean removal of all components |
| test-alert.sh | 190 | Alert system testing |
| plugin-health-check.sh | 169 | Plugin health and status monitoring |
| monitor-performance.sh | 152 | tmux performance metrics |
| kube_safe.sh | 9 | Kubernetes context safety wrapper |

## External Dependencies

- **tmux** 3.2+ (for popup support)
- **gpakosz/.tmux** framework
- **tmuxedo** plugin manager
- **fzf** (fuzzy finder)
- **lazygit** (git TUI)
- **nvim** (neovim)
- **gitmux** (git status in tmux)
- **tmux-sessionizer** / **tmux-cht.sh** (ThePrimeagen utilities)
- **kubectx/kubens** (Kubernetes context in status bar)
- **GNU Stow** (dotfiles symlink management)

## Known Issues (2026-03-25)

1. **tmux-resurrect not restoring sessions** — Reported in TODO.md, needs investigation
2. **Resurrect save location unclear** — Sessions are saved in `.tmux/resurrect/`

## Design Artifacts

WDS (Workshop Design System) pipeline scaffolded with phases A through G. Only E-PRD contains a `Design-Deliveries` subdirectory; all other phases are empty directories awaiting execution.

## Files Index

- [project-scan-report.json](project-scan-report.json) — Machine-readable scan data
- [index.md](index.md) — This document
